title: Stockout Risk Detected Event v1
description: Published after a SKU + warehouse stockout-risk alert event is persisted. It may feed demand review but cannot bypass Sale Lock, Recall, Hold, MRP, or owner approval.
$comment: Sources: PACK-03 Demand/MRP guards; PACK-01 Stock Gate; OD-FGSA-001/005/012.

eventType.description: Stable event type including source, domain, name, and v1 suffix.

source.description: System that owns and emits this event.

causationId.description: Optional parent command, event, or workflow identifier.

idempotencyKey.description: Required when emitted from retryable or high-risk command; optional for derived read-model notifications.
